outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH VOLATILITY EXPECTED: Strongly negative aggregate GEX (-5.94B) means dealers are heavily short gamma, which will amplify and accelerate any directional moves.
outlook.summary: The market is pinned between massive structural support at 700 and heavy Call resistance at 710. With deeply negative GEX across all expirations and an extremely high Put/Call Ratio (especially in Monthly at 3.77), dealers are dynamically hedging downward moves. A loss of the 700 support will likely trigger a violent deleveraging event.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected. Negative 0DTE GEX (-1.72B) amplifies directional moves. Spot pinned near Max Pain 645.
outlook.summary: Spot at 644.33, pinned near 0DTE Max Pain at 645 with extreme negative gamma (-1.72B) creating intraday volatility. Massive call walls at 647-650 cap upside, while put support at 640-635 limits downside. Bearish 0DTE smirk skew contrasts with bullish weekly/monthly reverse smirks, indicating range-bound pinning with violent intraday swings.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain with massive OI across all expiries: 0DTE Call 7072/Put 6341, WEEKLY Call 7975/Put 3709, MONTHLY Call 23238/Put 10373. Extreme volume ratios (67x Put, 26x Call) confirm active dealer hedging and pinning behavior.
Largest single OI in entire dataset: MONTHLY Call 38388. Supported by 0DTE Call 6667 (Vol/OI 47x) and WEEKLY Call 8495. Ultimate upside ceiling across all timeframes.
0DTE Call OI 10723 with extreme Vol/OI ratio of 35.4x (Vol 379799). WEEKLY Call OI 3669. Massive intraday hedging pressure creates hard resistance with dealer selling.
Largest 0DTE Put OI at 11021 with Vol 108426 (9.8x ratio). WEEKLY Put OI 9477, MONTHLY Put OI 10104. Deep institutional put support reinforced by bearish 0DTE skew.
WEEKLY Call OI 10997 and MONTHLY Call OI 32702. Secondary structural resistance above 650. Bullish weekly/monthly reverse smirk validates call wall strength.
Weekly gamma regime pivot. Below this level, dealer hedging amplifies downside moves. Critical support threshold with WEEKLY Put OI 12339 at 635 providing structural backing.
Monthly gamma regime threshold. Above this level, positive GEX creates stability and suppresses volatility. Key breakout confirmation level for sustained bullish moves.
0DTE Call OI 10675 with moderate Vol 21634. Secondary intraday resistance above the 647-650 cluster. Negative GEX environment means dealer selling intensifies on approach.
WEEKLY Put OI 12339 (largest weekly put) with Call OI 10651 creating a high-friction zone. Coincides with Weekly Gamma Flip at 635.31, amplifying importance.
MONTHLY Put OI 20422 with Call OI 31644. Deep structural support backed by 0DTE Put OI 7754. Negative total GEX prioritizes this support level for downside protection.
